originalLayout: English source asset: JoVE title block, two-column protocol body, figure placeholder, and branded footer.
translatedLayout: German output: same master slide, locked logo, retained image positions, and text boxes auto-fit to JoVE bounds.

segments.source: Prepare and label each sample before beginning the procedure.
segments.translated: Bereiten Sie jede Probe vor und beschriften Sie sie vor Beginn des Verfahrens.

segments.source: Record temperature, incubation time, and visible acceptance criteria.
segments.translated: Localized German segment preserving the numbered instruction and measurement terms.

segments.source: Do not translate the placeholder [Figure 1] or merge bullet levels.
segments.translated: Localized German segment with [Figure 1] preserved and bullet structure retained.

validationIssues.title: Translated slide text exceeds safe text-box bounds
validationIssues.recommendation: Auto-scale to the minimum allowed font size, then manually shorten the segment.

validationIssues.title: Figure placeholder changed during translation
validationIssues.recommendation: Restore [Figure 1] and [Table 2] placeholders exactly as source.

validationIssues.title: Scientific term consistency needs review
validationIssues.recommendation: Approve one glossary mapping and apply it across all assets.

validationIssues.title: JoVE visual template preserved
validationIssues.recommendation: Logos, colors, and image positions remained locked during generation.
